underlying_goal: Implement a comprehensive frontend-backend alignment plan for an AI assistant project, including creating a backend bridge module, protocol events, store refactoring, and filling in missing frontend UI/configuration gaps
friction_detail: User pointed out that MCP/Skills config, default model settings, screenshot UI, and other frontend features were still missing after the initial implementation was committed.
brief_summary: User asked to implement a large frontend-backend alignment plan (19 files, 1305 lines); Claude completed Phase 0-7, committed and pushed to a new private repo, but user identified significant remaining gaps in frontend configuration and default settings that weren't covered.
